PROVECTA GROUP

AI Audit Nurture Sequence  ·  Mobile-Optimised Email Templates  ·  Days 0 / 3 / 7 / 12 / 18 / 25

Mailing List: AI Prospects  ·  Zoho Campaigns Workflow: AI Audit Intake

Personalization variables: {{First Name}}, {{AI_Readiness_Tier}}, {{Company}}, {{Implementation_Timeline}}

Day 18 note: Three subject line variants — choose based on the barrier the prospect indicated in their assessment (budget / time / default). In Zoho, use Dynamic Content or create three separate message blocks for the three ICP variants.

Sender: hassan.qaseem@gc-usa.com (pending verification) — use hassanrqaseem@gmail.com as placeholder until verified.

How to upload: In Zoho Campaigns → Automation → Workflows → AI Audit Intake → click each MESSAGE node → Create Content → Blank → Code/HTML view → paste the source below each email.

Day 0 — Score Delivery MOBILE OPTIMISED

Subject: {{First Name}}, your AI Readiness score is in

▶ Email Preview (desktop)

View HTML Source (copy & paste into Zoho) 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
  <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no,date=no,address=no,email=no">
  <title>Provecta Group</title>
  <style>
  /* ── Reset ── */
  body, table, td, a { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
  table, td { mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; }
  img { border: 0; height: auto; line-height: 100%; outline: none; text-decoration: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; }

  /* ── Mobile (≤600px) ── */
  @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    .email-wrap     { padding: 0 !important; }
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; border-radius: 0 !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 16px 20px !important; }
    .logo-img       { width: 56px !important; max-width: 56px !important; }
    .brand-name     { font-size: 14px !important; }
    .brand-sub      { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 2px !important; }
    .divider-cell   { padding-right: 10px !important; }
    .text-cell      { padding-left: 10px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 28px 22px !important; }
    .body-p         { font-size: 15px !important; line-height: 1.65 !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 24px 20px !important; }
    .footer-locs    { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 1px !important; }
    .footer-small   { font-size: 10px !important; }
    .cta-td         { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; }
    .cta-a          { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; text-align: center !important;
                       padding: 16px 20px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; }
    .tier-td        { padding: 12px 14px !important; }
    .tier-title     { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .tier-body      { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .sig-name       { font-size: 15px !important; }
    .sig-company    { font-size: 12px !important; }
  }

  /* ── Tablet (601–768px) ── */
  @media only screen and (min-width: 601px) and (max-width: 768px) {
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; max-width: 600px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 34px 36px !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 20px 28px !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 26px 28px !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body style="margin:0;padding:0;background:#F8F4EC;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;">

width="80" class="logo-img"
                   style="display:block;width:80px;max-width:80px;height:auto;"
                   alt="Provecta Group">
            </td>
            <td class="divider-cell" valign="middle" width="20" style="padding-right:16px;">
              <div style="width:2px;height:48px;background:#C8A96E;margin:0 auto;"></div>
            </td>
            <td class="text-cell" valign="middle" style="padding-left:4px;">
              <div class="brand-name"
                   style="color:#FFFFFF;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;
                          font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                          margin-bottom:4px;">PROVECTA GROUP</div>
              <div class="brand-sub"
                   style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                          letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">AI CONSULTING</div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</td>
<!--[if mso]>
  </v:textbox>
</v:rect>
<![endif]--></tr>
      <tr><td><div style="height:3px;background:linear-gradient(to right,#C8A96E,#e8c98e,#C8A96E);"></div></td></tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="body-cell" style="padding:40px 48px;">
          <p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Hi {{First Name}},</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Your AI Readiness Assessment is complete. Here's what your score says about where {{Company}} stands right now — and what to do next.</p>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td class="tier-td"
        style="background:#E8F0FA;border-left:4px solid #1E65B0;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
      <div class="tier-title"
           style="color:#1E65B0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                  font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                  margin-bottom:8px;">Tier 1 — AI-Ready (Score: 16–21)</div>
      <div class="tier-body"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">
        Your score puts {{Company}} in the top tier of AI-ready organizations. You have the infrastructure — what most companies like yours are missing is the <strong>memory layer</strong> that makes AI compound. That&rsquo;s exactly what AI Memory Brain solves.
      </div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td class="tier-td"
        style="background:#EAF4E8;border-left:4px solid #1E65B0;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
      <div class="tier-title"
           style="color:#1E65B0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                  font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                  margin-bottom:8px;">Tier 2 — AI-Emerging (Score: 10–15)</div>
      <div class="tier-body"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">
        {{Company}} is in the AI-Emerging stage — you&rsquo;re ahead of 70% of companies your size. The next move is consolidating your AI usage into a <strong>structured memory system</strong> before the fragmentation gets worse.
      </div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td class="tier-td"
        style="background:#FBF6EE;border-left:4px solid #C8A96E;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
      <div class="tier-title"
           style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                  font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                  margin-bottom:8px;">Tier 3 — AI-Aware (Score: 5–9)</div>
      <div class="tier-body"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">
        {{Company}} is AI-Aware — you see the value, but haven&rsquo;t connected the dots yet. Most companies at your stage need <strong>1 structured implementation</strong> to unlock the compounding returns from AI.
      </div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td class="tier-td"
        style="background:#F0F0F8;border-left:4px solid #6677AA;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
      <div class="tier-title"
           style="color:#6677AA;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                  font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                  margin-bottom:8px;">Tier 4 — AI-Unaware (Score: 0–4)</div>
      <div class="tier-body"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">
        Most companies haven&rsquo;t started yet — so you&rsquo;re not behind. But the companies that move in the next 6 months will have a <strong>12–18 month head start</strong>. Here&rsquo;s the lowest-risk way to begin.
      </div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">I&rsquo;ll follow up with specific next steps for your {{AI_Readiness_Tier}} tier over the coming days. In the meantime, if you want to move fast — I&rsquo;m available for a quick call.</p>

<p style="margin:28px 0 0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
  <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
  <tr>
    <td class="cta-td"
        style="background:#0D2147;border-radius:5px;border-bottom:3px solid #C8A96E;">
      <a href="https://calendar.app.google/aCKhD12u6t3Khjta6" class="cta-a"
         style="display:inline-block;padding:14px 30px;color:#FFFFFF;
                font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;
                text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;">
        Book a Free AI Strategy Session &rarr;
      </a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
</p>
          <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-top:28px;">
  <tr>
    <td>
      <div class="sig-name"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;
                  color:#0D2147;margin-bottom:2px;">Hassan Wilson</div>
      <div class="sig-company"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#1E65B0;
                  letter-spacing:1px;">Provecta Group</div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
  <td class="footer-cell"
      style="background:#0D2147;padding:28px 40px;text-align:center;">
    <p style="margin:0 0 10px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#C8A96E;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;
         font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">PROVECTA GROUP</a>
    </p>
    <p class="footer-locs"
       style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
              letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 14px;">
      ATLANTA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; ASTANA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; NAIROBI
    </p>
    <p class="footer-small"
       style="color:#5566AA;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;margin:0;">
      &copy; 2026 Provecta Group &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="{{Unsubscribe}}" style="color:#5566AA;">Unsubscribe</a> &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#5566AA;">pgco.world</a>
    </p>
  </td>
</tr>
    </table>
  </td></tr>
</table>
</body>
</html>
Day 3 — What Companies At Your Stage Do Next MOBILE OPTIMISED

Subject: What {{AI_Readiness_Tier}} companies do next

▶ Email Preview (desktop)

View HTML Source (copy & paste into Zoho)

<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
  <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no,date=no,address=no,email=no">
  <title>Provecta Group</title>
  <style>
  /* ── Reset ── */
  body, table, td, a { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
  table, td { mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; }
  img { border: 0; height: auto; line-height: 100%; outline: none; text-decoration: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; }

  /* ── Mobile (≤600px) ── */
  @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    .email-wrap     { padding: 0 !important; }
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; border-radius: 0 !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 16px 20px !important; }
    .logo-img       { width: 56px !important; max-width: 56px !important; }
    .brand-name     { font-size: 14px !important; }
    .brand-sub      { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 2px !important; }
    .divider-cell   { padding-right: 10px !important; }
    .text-cell      { padding-left: 10px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 28px 22px !important; }
    .body-p         { font-size: 15px !important; line-height: 1.65 !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 24px 20px !important; }
    .footer-locs    { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 1px !important; }
    .footer-small   { font-size: 10px !important; }
    .cta-td         { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; }
    .cta-a          { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; text-align: center !important;
                       padding: 16px 20px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; }
    .tier-td        { padding: 12px 14px !important; }
    .tier-title     { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .tier-body      { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .sig-name       { font-size: 15px !important; }
    .sig-company    { font-size: 12px !important; }
  }

  /* ── Tablet (601–768px) ── */
  @media only screen and (min-width: 601px) and (max-width: 768px) {
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; max-width: 600px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 34px 36px !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 20px 28px !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 26px 28px !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body style="margin:0;padding:0;background:#F8F4EC;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;">
<!-- Preheader -->
<div style="display:none;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;mso-hide:all;">Concrete next steps mapped to your AI readiness level.&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;</div>

width="80" class="logo-img"
                   style="display:block;width:80px;max-width:80px;height:auto;"
                   alt="Provecta Group">
            </td>
            <td class="divider-cell" valign="middle" width="20" style="padding-right:16px;">
              <div style="width:2px;height:48px;background:#C8A96E;margin:0 auto;"></div>
            </td>
            <td class="text-cell" valign="middle" style="padding-left:4px;">
              <div class="brand-name"
                   style="color:#FFFFFF;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;
                          font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                          margin-bottom:4px;">PROVECTA GROUP</div>
              <div class="brand-sub"
                   style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                          letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">AI CONSULTING</div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</td>
<!--[if mso]>
  </v:textbox>
</v:rect>
<![endif]--></tr>
      <tr><td><div style="height:3px;background:linear-gradient(to right,#C8A96E,#e8c98e,#C8A96E);"></div></td></tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="body-cell" style="padding:40px 48px;">
          <p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Hi {{First Name}},</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Based on your assessment, {{Company}} is at the <strong>{{AI_Readiness_Tier}}</strong> stage. Here&rsquo;s what companies at your level typically do in the next 60–90 days to accelerate their AI advantage:</p>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="background:#F8F4EC;border-radius:6px;padding:4px;margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td style="padding:20px 24px;">
      <div style="color:#0D2147;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;
                  letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:14px;">
        NEXT STEPS FOR {{AI_Readiness_Tier}} ORGANIZATIONS
      </div>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">Audit current AI tools — identify which deliver value vs. which create noise</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">Centralize institutional knowledge into a structured AI memory layer</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">Establish a repeatable implementation framework before scaling adoption</td>
  </tr>
</table>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">At Provecta, this is exactly what we help organizations implement through our <strong>AI Memory Brain (AMB)</strong> program. It&rsquo;s not another AI tool — it&rsquo;s the architecture that makes every AI tool you already use more effective.</p>

<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Does this match where {{Company}} is headed?</p>

<p style="margin:28px 0 0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
  <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
  <tr>
    <td class="cta-td"
        style="background:#0D2147;border-radius:5px;border-bottom:3px solid #C8A96E;">
      <a href="https://calendar.app.google/aCKhD12u6t3Khjta6" class="cta-a"
         style="display:inline-block;padding:14px 30px;color:#FFFFFF;
                font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;
                text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;">
        Let's Talk — Book a Session &rarr;
      </a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
</p>
          <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-top:28px;">
  <tr>
    <td>
      <div class="sig-name"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;
                  color:#0D2147;margin-bottom:2px;">Hassan Wilson</div>
      <div class="sig-company"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#1E65B0;
                  letter-spacing:1px;">Provecta Group</div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
  <td class="footer-cell"
      style="background:#0D2147;padding:28px 40px;text-align:center;">
    <p style="margin:0 0 10px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#C8A96E;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;
         font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">PROVECTA GROUP</a>
    </p>
    <p class="footer-locs"
       style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
              letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 14px;">
      ATLANTA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; ASTANA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; NAIROBI
    </p>

       style="color:#5566AA;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;margin:0;">

  </td>
</tr>

Day 7 — AMB Demo / Deep Dive MOBILE OPTIMISED

Subject: How AI Memory Brain works (3-min overview)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">

  <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">

  <title>Provecta Group</title>
  <style>
  /* ── Reset ── */
  body, table, td, a { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
  table, td { mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; }
  img { border: 0; height: auto; line-height: 100%; outline: none; text-decoration: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; }

  /* ── Mobile (≤600px) ── */
  @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    .email-wrap     { padding: 0 !important; }
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; border-radius: 0 !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 16px 20px !important; }
    .logo-img       { width: 56px !important; max-width: 56px !important; }
    .brand-name     { font-size: 14px !important; }
    .brand-sub      { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 2px !important; }
    .divider-cell   { padding-right: 10px !important; }
    .text-cell      { padding-left: 10px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 28px 22px !important; }
    .body-p         { font-size: 15px !important; line-height: 1.65 !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 24px 20px !important; }
    .footer-locs    { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 1px !important; }
    .footer-small   { font-size: 10px !important; }
    .cta-td         { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; }
    .cta-a          { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; text-align: center !important;
                       padding: 16px 20px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; }
    .tier-td        { padding: 12px 14px !important; }
    .tier-title     { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .tier-body      { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .sig-name       { font-size: 15px !important; }
    .sig-company    { font-size: 12px !important; }
  }

  /* ── Tablet (601–768px) ── */
  @media only screen and (min-width: 601px) and (max-width: 768px) {
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; max-width: 600px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 34px 36px !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 20px 28px !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 26px 28px !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body style="margin:0;padding:0;background:#F8F4EC;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;">
<!-- Preheader -->
<div style="display:none;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;mso-hide:all;">A plain-language walkthrough of AMB — what it is, what it replaces, and how it's deployed.&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;</div>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       class="email-wrap" style="background:#F8F4EC;padding:24px 12px;">
  <tr><td align="center">
    <table role="presentation" width="600" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
           class="email-container"
           style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;
                  box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(13,33,71,0.12);max-width:600px;width:100%;">
      <tr><!--[if mso]>

width="80" class="logo-img"
                   style="display:block;width:80px;max-width:80px;height:auto;"
                   alt="Provecta Group">
            </td>
            <td class="divider-cell" valign="middle" width="20" style="padding-right:16px;">
              <div style="width:2px;height:48px;background:#C8A96E;margin:0 auto;"></div>
            </td>
            <td class="text-cell" valign="middle" style="padding-left:4px;">
              <div class="brand-name"
                   style="color:#FFFFFF;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;
                          font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                          margin-bottom:4px;">PROVECTA GROUP</div>
              <div class="brand-sub"
                   style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                          letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">AI CONSULTING</div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</td>
<!--[if mso]>
  </v:textbox>
</v:rect>
<![endif]--></tr>
      <tr><td><div style="height:3px;background:linear-gradient(to right,#C8A96E,#e8c98e,#C8A96E);"></div></td></tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="body-cell" style="padding:40px 48px;">
          <p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Hi {{First Name}},</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">A lot of the organizations I talk to at the <strong>{{AI_Readiness_Tier}}</strong> stage have the same question: <em>&ldquo;We&rsquo;re already using AI — what would AMB actually add?&rdquo;</em></p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Here&rsquo;s the plain-language answer:</p>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td style="background:#F8F4EC;border-left:4px solid #1E65B0;padding:20px 24px;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
      <div style="color:#1E65B0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;
                  letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;">WHAT AI MEMORY BRAIN DOES</div>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;"><strong>Retains context</strong> — AI tools forget. AMB gives them organizational memory that persists across sessions, teams, and tools.</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;"><strong>Structures knowledge</strong> — Converts scattered documents, decisions, and processes into a structured knowledge graph your AI can query.</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;"><strong>Compounds over time</strong> — Every interaction makes the system smarter. Month 6 outputs are materially better than Month 1.</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;"><strong>Deploys in 2 weeks</strong> — Not a 6-month implementation. We build the memory architecture alongside your existing stack.</td>
  </tr>
</table>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">For {{Company}} specifically — based on your {{Implementation_Timeline}} timeline — I&rsquo;d recommend a custom AMB architecture that fits your pace. Want to see what that would look like?</p>

<p style="margin:28px 0 0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
  <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
  <tr>
    <td class="cta-td"
        style="background:#0D2147;border-radius:5px;border-bottom:3px solid #C8A96E;">
      <a href="https://calendar.app.google/aCKhD12u6t3Khjta6" class="cta-a"
         style="display:inline-block;padding:14px 30px;color:#FFFFFF;
                font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;
                text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;">
        Request a Custom AMB Architecture &rarr;
      </a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
</p>
          <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-top:28px;">
  <tr>
    <td>
      <div class="sig-name"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;
                  color:#0D2147;margin-bottom:2px;">Hassan Wilson</div>
      <div class="sig-company"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#1E65B0;
                  letter-spacing:1px;">Provecta Group</div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
  <td class="footer-cell"
      style="background:#0D2147;padding:28px 40px;text-align:center;">
    <p style="margin:0 0 10px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#C8A96E;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;
         font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">PROVECTA GROUP</a>
    </p>
    <p class="footer-locs"
       style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
              letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 14px;">
      ATLANTA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; ASTANA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; NAIROBI
    </p>
    <p class="footer-small"
       style="color:#5566AA;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;margin:0;">
      &copy; 2026 Provecta Group &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="{{Unsubscribe}}" style="color:#5566AA;">Unsubscribe</a> &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#5566AA;">pgco.world</a>
    </p>
  </td>
</tr>
    </table>
  </td></tr>
</table>
</body>
</html>
Day 12 — ROI Framing + Offer MOBILE OPTIMISED

Subject: What's a broken AI strategy actually costing {{Company}}?

▶ Email Preview (desktop)

View HTML Source (copy & paste into Zoho)

<html lang="en">

  /* ── Reset ── */
  body, table, td, a { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
  table, td { mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; }
  img { border: 0; height: auto; line-height: 100%; outline: none; text-decoration: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; }

  /* ── Mobile (≤600px) ── */
  @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    .email-wrap     { padding: 0 !important; }
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; border-radius: 0 !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 16px 20px !important; }
    .logo-img       { width: 56px !important; max-width: 56px !important; }
    .brand-name     { font-size: 14px !important; }
    .brand-sub      { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 2px !important; }
    .divider-cell   { padding-right: 10px !important; }
    .text-cell      { padding-left: 10px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 28px 22px !important; }
    .body-p         { font-size: 15px !important; line-height: 1.65 !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 24px 20px !important; }
    .footer-locs    { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 1px !important; }
    .footer-small   { font-size: 10px !important; }
    .cta-td         { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; }
    .cta-a          { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; text-align: center !important;
                       padding: 16px 20px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; }
    .tier-td        { padding: 12px 14px !important; }
    .tier-title     { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .tier-body      { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .sig-name       { font-size: 15px !important; }
    .sig-company    { font-size: 12px !important; }
  }

  /* ── Tablet (601–768px) ── */
  @media only screen and (min-width: 601px) and (max-width: 768px) {
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; max-width: 600px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 34px 36px !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 20px 28px !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 26px 28px !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body style="margin:0;padding:0;background:#F8F4EC;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;">
<!-- Preheader -->
<div style="display:none;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;mso-hide:all;">The hidden cost of fragmented AI — and how to fix it.&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;</div>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       class="email-wrap" style="background:#F8F4EC;padding:24px 12px;">

width="80" class="logo-img"
                   style="display:block;width:80px;max-width:80px;height:auto;"
                   alt="Provecta Group">
            </td>
            <td class="divider-cell" valign="middle" width="20" style="padding-right:16px;">
              <div style="width:2px;height:48px;background:#C8A96E;margin:0 auto;"></div>
            </td>
            <td class="text-cell" valign="middle" style="padding-left:4px;">
              <div class="brand-name"
                   style="color:#FFFFFF;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;
                          font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                          margin-bottom:4px;">PROVECTA GROUP</div>
              <div class="brand-sub"
                   style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                          letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">AI CONSULTING</div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</td>
<!--[if mso]>
  </v:textbox>
</v:rect>
<![endif]--></tr>
      <tr><td><div style="height:3px;background:linear-gradient(to right,#C8A96E,#e8c98e,#C8A96E);"></div></td></tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="body-cell" style="padding:40px 48px;">
          <p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Hi {{First Name}},</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">I want to share a number that surprises most leaders I work with:</p>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td style="background:#0D2147;border-radius:6px;padding:24px 28px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:40px;font-weight:bold;
                  line-height:1;margin-bottom:8px;">23%</div>
      <div style="color:#FFFFFF;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;">
        of productivity gains from AI are lost to context fragmentation —<br>
        teams re-explaining the same things to AI tools that don&rsquo;t remember.
      </div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">For {{Company}}, that fragmentation compounds every time a team member changes, a project closes, or a new AI tool gets added without a shared knowledge layer.</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">AMB eliminates this. Here&rsquo;s the ROI frame most of my clients use:</p>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">If your team spends <strong>2 hours/week</strong> re-contextualizing AI — that&rsquo;s 100+ hours/year per person.</td>
  </tr>
</table>
<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">AMB reduces that to near-zero within 90 days of deployment.</td>
  </tr>
</table>
<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">The institutional knowledge you build also becomes a <strong>competitive asset</strong> — not just an efficiency gain.</td>
  </tr>
</table>

<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;" style="margin-top:18px;">The AI Strategy Session is free and takes 30 minutes. We&rsquo;ll map the specific AMB architecture for {{Company}} and give you a clear ROI estimate before any commitment.</p>

<p style="margin:28px 0 0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
  <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
  <tr>
    <td class="cta-td"
        style="background:#0D2147;border-radius:5px;border-bottom:3px solid #C8A96E;">
      <a href="https://calendar.app.google/aCKhD12u6t3Khjta6" class="cta-a"
         style="display:inline-block;padding:14px 30px;color:#FFFFFF;
                font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;
                text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;">
        Book a Free AI Strategy Session &rarr;
      </a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
</p>
          <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-top:28px;">
  <tr>
    <td>
      <div class="sig-name"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;
                  color:#0D2147;margin-bottom:2px;">Hassan Wilson</div>
      <div class="sig-company"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#1E65B0;
                  letter-spacing:1px;">Provecta Group</div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
  <td class="footer-cell"
      style="background:#0D2147;padding:28px 40px;text-align:center;">
    <p style="margin:0 0 10px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#C8A96E;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;
         font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">PROVECTA GROUP</a>
    </p>
    <p class="footer-locs"
       style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
              letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 14px;">
      ATLANTA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; ASTANA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; NAIROBI
    </p>
    <p class="footer-small"
       style="color:#5566AA;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;margin:0;">
      &copy; 2026 Provecta Group &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="{{Unsubscribe}}" style="color:#5566AA;">Unsubscribe</a> &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#5566AA;">pgco.world</a>
    </p>
  </td>
</tr>
    </table>
  </td></tr>
</table>
</body>
</html>
Day 18 — Barrier-Specific Follow-Up MOBILE OPTIMISED

Subject: (Budget) Starting AMB doesn't require a big budget | (Time) AMB takes 2 weeks | (Default) Still thinking about AI for {{Company}}?

  <style>
  /* ── Reset ── */
  body, table, td, a { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
  table, td { mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; }
  img { border: 0; height: auto; line-height: 100%; outline: none; text-decoration: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; }

  /* ── Mobile (≤600px) ── */
  @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    .email-wrap     { padding: 0 !important; }
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; border-radius: 0 !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 16px 20px !important; }
    .logo-img       { width: 56px !important; max-width: 56px !important; }
    .brand-name     { font-size: 14px !important; }
    .brand-sub      { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 2px !important; }
    .divider-cell   { padding-right: 10px !important; }
    .text-cell      { padding-left: 10px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 28px 22px !important; }
    .body-p         { font-size: 15px !important; line-height: 1.65 !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 24px 20px !important; }
    .footer-locs    { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 1px !important; }
    .footer-small   { font-size: 10px !important; }
    .cta-td         { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; }
    .cta-a          { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; text-align: center !important;
                       padding: 16px 20px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; }
    .tier-td        { padding: 12px 14px !important; }
    .tier-title     { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .tier-body      { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .sig-name       { font-size: 15px !important; }
    .sig-company    { font-size: 12px !important; }
  }

  /* ── Tablet (601–768px) ── */
  @media only screen and (min-width: 601px) and (max-width: 768px) {
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; max-width: 600px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 34px 36px !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 20px 28px !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 26px 28px !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body style="margin:0;padding:0;background:#F8F4EC;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;">
<!-- Preheader -->
<div style="display:none;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;mso-hide:all;">Addressing the most common barrier — let's find an entry point that works for you.&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;</div>

width="80" class="logo-img"
                   style="display:block;width:80px;max-width:80px;height:auto;"
                   alt="Provecta Group">
            </td>
            <td class="divider-cell" valign="middle" width="20" style="padding-right:16px;">
              <div style="width:2px;height:48px;background:#C8A96E;margin:0 auto;"></div>
            </td>
            <td class="text-cell" valign="middle" style="padding-left:4px;">
              <div class="brand-name"
                   style="color:#FFFFFF;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;
                          font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                          margin-bottom:4px;">PROVECTA GROUP</div>
              <div class="brand-sub"
                   style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                          letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">AI CONSULTING</div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</td>
<!--[if mso]>
  </v:textbox>
</v:rect>
<![endif]--></tr>
      <tr><td><div style="height:3px;background:linear-gradient(to right,#C8A96E,#e8c98e,#C8A96E);"></div></td></tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="body-cell" style="padding:40px 48px;">
          <p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Hi {{First Name}},</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">I know there&rsquo;s usually one thing that slows decisions down — budget, timing, or just uncertainty about where to start. Whatever it is for {{Company}}, I want to make sure it&rsquo;s not standing in the way.</p>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
        <tr>
          <td style="background:#F8F4EC;border-left:4px solid #C8A96E;padding:16px 20px;
                     border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;margin-bottom:12px;">
            <div style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;
                        letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">IF IT&rsquo;S BUDGET</div>
            <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:#1A1A2E;line-height:1.6;">
              We offer a <strong>Starter AMB Kit</strong> — a self-directed implementation guide + 2 live sessions with a Provecta consultant. Fraction of the cost, same structural foundation.
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr><td style="height:10px;"></td></tr>
        <tr>
          <td style="background:#F8F4EC;border-left:4px solid #1E65B0;padding:16px 20px;
                     border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
            <div style="color:#1E65B0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;
                        letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">IF IT&rsquo;S TIMING</div>
            <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:#1A1A2E;line-height:1.6;">
              The 30-min strategy session has zero commitment. We define the architecture now, you implement on your timeline. I&rsquo;ll build you a phased roadmap that fits {{Implementation_Timeline}}.
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </table>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Either way — let&rsquo;s find a path that works for {{Company}} right now.</p>

<p style="margin:28px 0 0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
  <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
  <tr>
    <td class="cta-td"
        style="background:#0D2147;border-radius:5px;border-bottom:3px solid #C8A96E;">
      <a href="https://calendar.app.google/aCKhD12u6t3Khjta6" class="cta-a"
         style="display:inline-block;padding:14px 30px;color:#FFFFFF;
                font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;
                text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;">
        Find the Right Starting Point &rarr;
      </a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
</p>
          <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-top:28px;">
  <tr>
    <td>
      <div class="sig-name"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;
                  color:#0D2147;margin-bottom:2px;">Hassan Wilson</div>
      <div class="sig-company"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#1E65B0;
                  letter-spacing:1px;">Provecta Group</div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
  <td class="footer-cell"
      style="background:#0D2147;padding:28px 40px;text-align:center;">
    <p style="margin:0 0 10px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#C8A96E;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;
         font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">PROVECTA GROUP</a>
    </p>
    <p class="footer-locs"
       style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
              letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 14px;">
      ATLANTA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; ASTANA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; NAIROBI
    </p>
    <p class="footer-small"
       style="color:#5566AA;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;margin:0;">
      &copy; 2026 Provecta Group &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="{{Unsubscribe}}" style="color:#5566AA;">Unsubscribe</a> &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#5566AA;">pgco.world</a>
    </p>
  </td>
</tr>
    </table>
  </td></tr>
</table>
</body>
</html>
Day 25 — Final Value Drop MOBILE OPTIMISED

Subject: Last one from me, {{First Name}}

▶ Email Preview (desktop)

View HTML Source (copy & paste into Zoho) 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
  <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no,date=no,address=no,email=no">
  <title>Provecta Group</title>
  <style>
  /* ── Reset ── */
  body, table, td, a { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
  table, td { mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; }
  img { border: 0; height: auto; line-height: 100%; outline: none; text-decoration: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; }

  /* ── Mobile (≤600px) ── */
  @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    .email-wrap     { padding: 0 !important; }
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; border-radius: 0 !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 16px 20px !important; }
    .logo-img       { width: 56px !important; max-width: 56px !important; }
    .brand-name     { font-size: 14px !important; }
    .brand-sub      { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 2px !important; }
    .divider-cell   { padding-right: 10px !important; }
    .text-cell      { padding-left: 10px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 28px 22px !important; }
    .body-p         { font-size: 15px !important; line-height: 1.65 !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 24px 20px !important; }
    .footer-locs    { font-size: 10px !important; letter-spacing: 1px !important; }
    .footer-small   { font-size: 10px !important; }
    .cta-td         { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; }
    .cta-a          { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; text-align: center !important;
                       padding: 16px 20px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; }
    .tier-td        { padding: 12px 14px !important; }
    .tier-title     { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .tier-body      { font-size: 13px !important; }
    .sig-name       { font-size: 15px !important; }
    .sig-company    { font-size: 12px !important; }
  }

  /* ── Tablet (601–768px) ── */
  @media only screen and (min-width: 601px) and (max-width: 768px) {
    .email-container{ width: 100% !important; max-width: 600px !important; }
    .body-cell      { padding: 34px 36px !important; }
    .header-cell    { padding: 20px 28px !important; }
    .footer-cell    { padding: 26px 28px !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body style="margin:0;padding:0;background:#F8F4EC;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;">
<!-- Preheader -->
<div style="display:none;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;mso-hide:all;">One resource before I close — whether or not we work together.&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;&nbsp;&zwnj;</div>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       class="email-wrap" style="background:#F8F4EC;padding:24px 12px;">
  <tr><td align="center">
    <table role="presentation" width="600" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
           class="email-container"
           style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;
                  box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(13,33,71,0.12);max-width:600px;width:100%;">
      <tr><!--[if mso]>

width="80" class="logo-img"
                   style="display:block;width:80px;max-width:80px;height:auto;"
                   alt="Provecta Group">
            </td>
            <td class="divider-cell" valign="middle" width="20" style="padding-right:16px;">
              <div style="width:2px;height:48px;background:#C8A96E;margin:0 auto;"></div>
            </td>
            <td class="text-cell" valign="middle" style="padding-left:4px;">
              <div class="brand-name"
                   style="color:#FFFFFF;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;
                          font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
                          margin-bottom:4px;">PROVECTA GROUP</div>
              <div class="brand-sub"
                   style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
                          letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">AI CONSULTING</div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</td>
<!--[if mso]>
  </v:textbox>
</v:rect>
<![endif]--></tr>
      <tr><td><div style="height:3px;background:linear-gradient(to right,#C8A96E,#e8c98e,#C8A96E);"></div></td></tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="body-cell" style="padding:40px 48px;">
          <p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Hi {{First Name}},</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">This is my last email in this sequence. Whether the timing isn&rsquo;t right, the priorities shifted, or you&rsquo;re still evaluating — I get it, and there&rsquo;s no pressure.</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Before I close your file, I want to leave you with something genuinely useful regardless of where you land:</p>

<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="background:#F8F4EC;border-radius:6px;margin:20px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td style="padding:24px 28px;">
      <div style="color:#0D2147;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;
                  margin-bottom:4px;">AI Memory Brain White Paper</div>
      <div style="color:#555;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;
                  margin-bottom:16px;">The Architecture of Compounding AI Value</div>
      <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:#1A1A2E;line-height:1.7;">
        This is the same framework I use in client engagements. It covers:
      </div>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">Why most enterprise AI fails to compound — and the structural fix</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">The 4-layer AMB architecture (Memory, Context, Retrieval, Output)</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">A readiness checklist for your {{AI_Readiness_Tier}} tier</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0"
       style="margin:6px 0;">
  <tr>
    <td width="16" valign="top"
        style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;padding-top:1px;">&#9656;</td>
    <td style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:#1A1A2E;">Implementation sequencing for teams of 10–500+</td>
  </tr>
</table>
      <div style="margin-top:16px;">
        <a href="https://pgco.world/AIMemoryBrain/Marketing/ai-memory-brain-landing.html"
           style="color:#1E65B0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;
                  text-decoration:underline;">Access the White Paper &rarr;</a>
      </div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">If you ever want to apply this to {{Company}} specifically — or if the timing shifts — my calendar is always open.</p>
<p class="body-p" style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;color:#1A1A2E;margin:0 0 18px;">Thanks for engaging with the assessment. I hope it was useful.</p>
          <table role="presentation" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-top:28px;">
  <tr>
    <td>
      <div class="sig-name"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;
                  color:#0D2147;margin-bottom:2px;">Hassan Wilson</div>
      <div class="sig-company"
           style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#1E65B0;
                  letter-spacing:1px;">Provecta Group</div>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
  <td class="footer-cell"
      style="background:#0D2147;padding:28px 40px;text-align:center;">
    <p style="margin:0 0 10px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#C8A96E;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;
         font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;">PROVECTA GROUP</a>
    </p>
    <p class="footer-locs"
       style="color:#C8A96E;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;
              letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 14px;">
      ATLANTA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; ASTANA &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; NAIROBI
    </p>
    <p class="footer-small"
       style="color:#5566AA;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;margin:0;">
      &copy; 2026 Provecta Group &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="{{Unsubscribe}}" style="color:#5566AA;">Unsubscribe</a> &nbsp;|&nbsp;
      <a href="https://pgco.world" style="color:#5566AA;">pgco.world</a>
    </p>
  </td>
</tr>
    </table>
  </td></tr>
</table>
</body>
</html>
